title: alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. arcuatum
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. arcuatum, also known as the curved water plantain, is a plant species belonging to the water plantain family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as edema and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. arcuatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve kidney function, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other gynecological issues. Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. arcuatum can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried roots and rhizomes in hot water, or as a capsule or tincture by extracting its active compounds using a solvent.
